pandya.notes: Surname associated with the historical Pandya dynasty and Gujarati communities.

patel.notes: Among the most common Indian-American surnames, especially after 1965.

singh.notes: Strong ties to Punjabi migration waves.

garcia.notes: One of the most common Hispanic surnames in the U.S.

o'brien.notes: Irish diaspora migration peaked in the 19th century.

rossi.notes: Italian immigration through Ellis Island era.

kim.notes: Korean immigration increased after the 1965 Act and 1990 reforms.
